query:

UNION ALL
SELECT 'station_tasks' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM station_tasks WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE batchNo IN ('FLOW-STOCK-BATCH-1779024145508', 'MANUAL-NEXT-1779024163008-01', 'RESTORE-BATCH-1779024197350'))
UNION ALL
